[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010101 4
1 11011101 6
2 11111010 6
3 10011111 6
4 01011100 4
5 01111101 6
6 11011101 6
7 11011110 6
